name: Red & Black Raspberry Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen red raspberries in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and drain the frozen red raspberries well, reserving one-third of the syrup.
2. Pick over the fresh berries.
3. In a heavy saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch. Add the reserved syrup and lemon juice, stirring until smooth. Add the thawed fruit and black raspberries; bring to a boil over moderate heat, stirring constantly, then simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Cream butter in a bowl. Gradually add sugar, beating well. Incorporate egg and vanilla; beat until smooth.
5. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into another bowl. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture in small batches, mixing after each addition until batter is smooth.
6. Pour batter evenly into a lightly buttered 9-inch square pan. Spoon berry mixture over top. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Lower temperature to 325°F and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out clean. Cool on rack for 10 minutes.
7. Serve with cream or whipped cream.
